summary: Integrated ADR 0303 onto latest `origin/main` baseline `dc3a969e7c8de8fd727cca034418a4b49d6e2b64` as repository version `0.177.122` while preserving the already-current platform baseline `0.130.78`. The final exact-main closeout records the repo-managed PostgreSQL pgaudit rollout, the stabilized guest-log-shipping verification contract, the repaired unknown-role alert relay plus JetStream publication path, and the refreshed release, remote validation, and pre-push evidence from committed source `99b51ba1572be6df3411d4b4ef499e660a1dd7e0`.

verification.observed: The targeted ADR 0303 test bundle `tests/test_guest_log_shipping_playbook.py`, `tests/test_monitoring_vm_role.py`, `tests/unit/test_event_taxonomy.py`, and `tests/test_service_id_resolver.py` passed with `29 passed in 0.75s`, preserving the stabilized guest-log-shipping metrics verification contract after the latest `origin/main` integration.

The released `0.177.122` candidate passed `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=guest-log-shipping env=production`, re-verifying the guarded wrapper path, the Prometheus scrape assertions, and the post-apply Restic trigger. The final recap reported `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=17 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0`, and the backup trigger recorded `receipts/restic-backups/20260331T192735Z.json` with config snapshot `1ad975dcc1b3be1be5b48d2ea3f7ae8b730571e840317f53498bb7467b099f78` plus `versions/stack.yaml` snapshot `68960faae1f91e15d644b7d93adcd279953de9acb561f9e494968c37a726bc3c`.

The repository release cut advanced `VERSION` to `0.177.122`, refreshed the canonical truth surfaces, updated ADR/workstream metadata, and recorded ADR 0303 as implemented on `main` while preserving the already-current platform version `0.130.78`.

`make check-build-server`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed on the released candidate. The remote pre-push lane truthfully recorded transient `502 Bad Gateway` pulls for `registry.example.com/check-runner/infra:2026.03.23`, then `run_gate_fallback` reran only `packer-validate` and `tofu-validate` locally and merged the passing result back into `.local/validation-gate/last-run.json`.

notes: ADR 0303 is first implemented in repository version `0.177.122` and first verified live on platform version `0.130.77`.

This canonical mainline closeout preserves the already-current platform baseline `0.130.78` rather than advancing it again, because the PostgreSQL pgaudit capability was already live before the newer exact-main release cut.
The earlier final smoke proved the alert relay and NATS publication path after repairing a missing live guest-firewall allow on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

The broad guest-network-policy replay still surfaced an unrelated `postgres-replica-lv3` SSH reachability failure; that residual issue is preserved as evidence but does not block ADR 0303 itself because the repaired runtime path now functions end to end.
